data.description:
## Why
The bot is being dropped; its code is the bug surface (15a1/0d3e/dc33). Deleting it is the resolution of those bugs.
## What
- [ ] Delete infra/autolander/ (loop.py, gerrit.py, failure.py, land.py, __init__.py) and tests/autolander/.
- [ ] Remove the land / land-status CLI command + its wiring, and docs/land-contract.md.
- [ ] Remove any imports/registry entries/refs to the above (grep sweep: autolander, land_contract, land-status).
- [ ] Update the module-size allowlist / any config referencing infra/autolander.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No references to infra/autolander or the land command remain (grep clean).
- [ ] make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
- [ ] Obsoletes bugs dc33, 15a1, 0d3e (close them when this lands).
data.title: Delete the auto-lander code (infra/autolander, land command, land-contract)
